severity_rationale: Partial remediation of prior report-v001 chain. The open-redirect sink (evil.com reachability) is now blocked (HTTP 500 on hop 3), but auth_token_account_id still leaks in hop-2 URL, referrer-policy unsafe-url still set on hops 0-1 (auth-code Referer leak surface), and state JSON lacks CSRF nonce. NOT a duplicate of prior — this is an authorized re-test showing incomplete remediation; submit as 'partial remediation update' tied to v001 H1 ticket.
validation_method: Curl reproduction + dev-browser v3-auth session + cross-reference with report-v001 artifacts
response_summary: Malicious origin_uri still propagates unchanged through hops 0-2; hop-3 sink now 500s instead of redirecting to attacker origin (fix applied). auth_token_account_id=rcVobEe+JpAshojPvHU9ArXf//8fzXNnCsERjQnZjZY= still leaks in hop-2 URL (same value as v001, not rotated). referrer-policy unsafe-url still present on hops 0-1.
impact: Residual OAuth code exposure via Referer (unsafe-url on hops 0-1); permanent encrypted account identifier leaked in URL on every store->api SSO round-trip (browser history, CDN logs, any 3rd-party resource on landing page). State-parameter CSRF surface unchanged (see F-A-003).
chain: F-A-001 + F-A-003 + F-A-004 (OAuth+CSRF + info_disclosure chain): attacker-supplied state + no nonce + leaked account identifier = login-CSRF with persistent victim-account correlation.
chain_severity_upgrade: P3 -> P2 when chained with F-A-003/F-A-004
remediation: Complete the remediation started after report-v001: (1) rotate auth_token_account_id and remove it from URL, (2) add CSRF nonce to state, (3) change referrer-policy from unsafe-url to same-origin on /authorize/.

reportability_audit.Q1_evidence: PASS — curl+browser reproduction with recorded hop-by-hop evidence in attack-a-evidence/
reportability_audit.Q3_impact_demonstrated: PASS — concrete leaked value, identical to prior token, documented in attack-a-results.json
reportability_audit.Q4_not_low_class_solo: PASS — oauth_misconfiguration is not in q4_low_class_solo_list
reportability_audit.prior_report_similarity: 0.6 — PARTIAL MATCH to v001 (explicitly retest + partial remediation). Keep as follow-up.
